title: Robust Raw Dutch Beet Tagine
description: A refreshing and earthy Dutch dish featuring raw beets and red wine vinegar, perfect for a brunch mood. This raw-friendly recipe is served in a traditional tagine pot.
instructions: In a large tagine pot, combine the katsuramuki-cut beets, red wine vinegar, olive oil, salt, and black pepper.
Mix well to coat the beets evenly with the marinade.
Add the minced garlic to the pot and stir gently.
Sprinkle the chopped parsley over the beets and mix again.
Squeeze the lemon juice over the top of the beets and stir one last time.
Cover the tagine pot and refrigerate for at least 30 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Just before serving, give the beets a good stir and adjust the seasoning if needed.
Serve the Robust Raw Dutch Beet Tagine chilled, straight from the tagine pot.
